  • Resume

    Emma Ozanich

    Scientist/engineer using models and real-world data to study ocean sound. In 2014, I moved from land-locked Minnesota to California to study the physics of sound in the ocean.

    This theme supports link posts, made famous by John Gruber. To use, just add link: http://url-you-want-linked to the post’s YAML front matter and you’re done.
